info.name: OIDC Groups Mapping
info.summary: Map OIDC token claims to Nextcloud groups with a visual rule editor
info.description:
Map multiple OIDC token claims to Nextcloud groups using configurable rules.
**Admin UI** — visual rule editor with drag-and-drop reorder, raw JSON editor, and claim simulator. **5 rule types** — direct, prefix, map, conditional, template. **REST API** — manage rules programmatically via OCS endpoints. **OCC commands** — list, set, and test rules from the CLI. **Dark mode** — full support for Nextcloud dark and light themes.
Works with any identity provider through the user_oidc app. Requires user_oidc to be installed and enabled.
info.author: Pierre Strobel
